messages.content: You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My father used to wake up before the sun and go to the fields. He never complained, not once in his whole life.
{"who": "father", "relationship": "parent", "how_referenced": "named by role"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was an old woman in our village, we all called her Kanchi Buwa. She knew every herb growing on the hillside.
{"who": "Kanchi Buwa", "relationship": "village elder, non-family", "how_referenced": "named by nickname"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My grandmother on my mother's side — we called her Hajuramma — she would tell stories every night after dinner.
{"who": "Hajuramma", "relationship": "maternal grandmother", "how_referenced": "named by kinship title"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The priest at the Ganesh temple, I don't remember his name, but he had a very deep voice and always smelled of incense.
{"who": "unnamed priest", "relationship": "religious figure, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by role and physical detail"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My elder brother Bishnu was the one who taught me to ride a bicycle. He held the seat and ran alongside me for a whole afternoon.
{"who": "Bishnu", "relationship": "elder brother", "how_referenced": "named"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a neighbor, a thin man who sold vegetables from a bamboo basket every morning. I never knew his full name.
{"who": "unnamed vegetable seller", "relationship": "neighbor, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by occupation and appearance"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My mother's younger sister, my sano maijyu, came to live with us for one whole monsoon season when her husband was away for work.
{"who": "sano maijyu", "relationship": "maternal aunt (younger)", "how_referenced": "named by kinship title in Nepali"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a schoolteacher, a strict woman, we were all terrified of her. She once made me stand outside the class for an hour.
{"who": "unnamed schoolteacher", "relationship": "teacher, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by role and character"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My husband's father, my sasura, was a quiet man. He only spoke when something truly important needed to be said.
{"who": "sasura", "relationship": "father-in-law", "how_referenced": "named by kinship title in Nepali"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My youngest daughter Sunita was the one who first brought a radio into our home. We all gathered to listen.
{"who": "Sunita", "relationship": "youngest daughter", "how_referenced": "named"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The man who used to fix umbrellas came every summer, carrying all his tools in a cloth bundle. I don't think he was from our district.
{"who": "unnamed umbrella repairman", "relationship": "traveling tradesman, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by occupation and seasonal appearance"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My buba — my father's father — lived until he was very old. His hands were always warm, even in winter.
{"who": "buba", "relationship": "paternal grandfather", "how_referenced": "named by kinship title in Nepali"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a girl in our class named Laxmi. She was the smartest of all of us but never boasted about it.
{"who": "Laxmi", "relationship": "classmate, non-family", "how_referenced": "named"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My mother would sing while she cooked. I can still hear her voice if I close my eyes.
{"who": "mother", "relationship": "parent", "how_referenced": "named by role"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was an old man who sat outside the Pashupatinath gate every morning. He had no teeth but always smiled at the children.
{"who": "unnamed old man", "relationship": "stranger, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by location and physical detail"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My cousin Raju from Chitwan — we grew up like brothers. He came every Dashain to stay with us for two weeks.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"who": "Dhan Bahadur", "relationship": "village headman, non-family", "how_referenced": "named by name and role"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My wife's mother, my sasu, made the best achar I have ever eaten. She never shared the exact recipe with anyone.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a monk who passed through our village once. He stayed three days, said very little, and then was gone.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My son Ram, the second one, went to Kathmandu for work when he was only seventeen. I cried for a week after he left.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My husband Gopal was a patient man. He waited three years before we finally had enough money to build a proper room.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"who": "unnamed tea shop owner", "relationship": "local shopkeeper, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by role and skill"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My father's elder brother, my jethi buba, owned the only radio in the village for many years. We all gathered at his house for the evening news.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a girl who used to come to our house to help with chores. She was maybe twelve or thirteen. I don't know what became of her.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My wife is a strong woman. When I was sick for two months, she ran everything herself — the fields, the children, everything.
{"who": "wife", "relationship": "spouse", "how_referenced": "named by role"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was a boy in our neighborhood called Kale — I think it was just a nickname. He was always getting into some kind of trouble.
{"who": "Kale", "relationship": "neighborhood acquaintance, non-family", "how_referenced": "named by nickname"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My nani — my mother — she was the one who decided everything in our house. My father would always say, ask your mother.
{"who": "nani", "relationship": "mother", "how_referenced": "named by regional kinship term"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
The doctor in our town — Dr. Sharma, I think his name was — he delivered almost every child in the valley during those years.
{"who": "Dr. Sharma", "relationship": "local doctor, non-family", "how_referenced": "named with title and role"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My eldest granddaughter, Priya, she is the one who convinced me to tell these stories. She always had a notebook in her hand.
{"who": "Priya", "relationship": "eldest granddaughter", "how_referenced": "named"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My maijyu — my father's sister — she used to bring sweets whenever she visited. She smelled of mustard oil and cardamom.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"who": "Harka", "relationship": "local postman, non-family", "how_referenced": "named, also referenced by occupation"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My second son-in-law, I never liked him very much at first. But when my husband passed, he was the one who sat with me all night.
{"who": "second son-in-law", "relationship": "son-in-law (second daughter's husband)", "how_referenced": "named by role and birth order of daughter"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
There was an old man in the village called Daju by everyone, even people older than him. He was that respected.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"who": "unnamed lemon lady", "relationship": "neighbor, non-family", "how_referenced": "described by informal community nickname and trade"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the person reference as JSON with keys: who, relationship, how_referenced. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
My grandfather — on my father's side — he fought in the war. He never spoke about it, but you could see it in his eyes sometimes.
{"who": "paternal grandfather", "relationship": "paternal grandfather", "how_referenced": "named by role with lineage specified"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"when": "Mangsir, early winter", "time_type": "Nepali month + season onset", "precision": "exact month"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"when": "before bratabandha ceremony, approximately under age 11", "time_type": "pre-ritual milestone, age upper bound", "precision": "approximate upper bound"}

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"when": "Kartik, harvest season", "time_type": "Nepali month + agricultural phase", "precision": "exact month"}

I was just a baby, so I don't remember it myself. My mother told me it was the year of the big drought, when even the wells ran low.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the time reference as JSON with keys: when, time_type, precision. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

{"when": "coldest remembered winter, approximately age 26–27", "time_type": "season intensity + age + family milestone", "precision": "approximate"}
You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.

You are an extractor agent. Given a memory fragment, extract the place reference as JSON with keys: where, place_type, specificity. Output only valid JSON, nothing else.
